positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration featuring a celestial woodland creature—a graceful fox-like spirit sitting amidst luminous bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The composition should be central and symmetrical, creating a clean silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Use a deep color palette of sapphire blues, emerald greens, and glowing gold accents for the magical elements. The style should be reminiscent of highly detailed Nordic folk art mixed with modern sticker illustration, ensuring crisp, defined edges and strong contrast against a clean background. Perfect for a t-shirt print. Vector art aesthetic, minimal gradients, highly intricate details, dramatic backlighting.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noisy, abstract, photo, realism, muted colors
